name: <OnAREthEventReceived>
title: <OnAREthEventReceived>
description: This callback function is called by AUTOSAR Eth IL when a notification message has been received for the Event specified in the cevHandle parameter.
A callback function with this signature must be passed to the CAPL function AREthCreateEventConsumer.

parameters.name: cevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that triggered the callback, see AREthCreateEventConsumer.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Message handle of the SOME/IP Event.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
